sentences.target: Der Leiter ist heute nicht im Büro.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈlaɪ̯tɐ ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɪçt ɪm byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Der Leiter ist heute nicht im Büro.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈlaɪ̯tɐ ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɪçt ɪm byˈʁoː/
translations.en: The manager isn’t in the office today.
translations.es: El gerente no está en la oficina hoy.
translations.fr: Le responsable n’est pas au bureau aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi il responsabile non è in ufficio.
translations.pt: O gerente não está no escritório hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay quản lý không ở văn phòng.
translations.nl: De manager is vandaag niet op kantoor.
translations.hu: A vezető ma nincs az irodában.
translations.hi: मैनेजर आज ऑफिस में नहीं है.
translations.pl: Kierownika dziś nie ma w biurze.
translations.el: Ο διευθυντής σήμερα δεν είναι στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Sjefen er ikke på kontoret i dag.
translations.id: Manajer tidak ada di kantor hari ini.
translations.sv: Chefen är inte på kontoret i dag.
translations.ro: Managerul nu este la birou astăzi.
translations.da: Chefen er ikke på kontoret i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はマネージャーはオフィスにいません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular, marking the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP.
Copular auxiliary (present 3rd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate, expressing absence.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’) introducing a locative PP with dative.
Noun in dative singular as object of the preposition; forms the predicate complement (locative PP).

sentences.target: Ich frage den Leiter wegen meiner Arbeitszeiten.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈlaɪ̯tɐ ˈveːɡən ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tsˌtsaɪ̯tn̩/

translations.de: Ich frage den Leiter wegen meiner Arbeitszeiten.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈlaɪ̯tɐ ˈveːɡən ˈmaɪ̯nɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tsˌtsaɪ̯tn̩/
translations.en: I’m asking the manager about my work hours.
translations.es: Le estoy preguntando al gerente sobre mi horario de trabajo.
translations.fr: Je demande au responsable mes horaires.
translations.it: Chiedo al responsabile dei miei orari di lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在问经理我的工作时间。
translations.yue: 我問緊經理我嘅工作時間。
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю у менеджера про свой график работы.
translations.pt: Estou perguntando ao gerente sobre meu horário de trabalho.
translations.he: אני שואל את המנהל על שעות העבודה שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang hỏi quản lý về giờ làm việc của mình.
translations.ar: أنا أسأل المدير عن ساعات عملي.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de manager naar mijn werktijden.
translations.uk: Я питаю менеджера про свій робочий графік.
translations.hi: मैं मैनेजर से अपने काम के समय के बारे में पूछ रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Pytam kierownika o moje godziny pracy.
translations.el: Ρωτάω τον διευθυντή για το ωράριό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg spør sjefen om arbeidstiden min.
translations.id: Saya menanyakan jam kerja saya kepada manajer.
translations.sv: Jag frågar chefen om mina arbetstider.
translations.ro: Îl întreb pe manager despre programul meu de lucru.
translations.cs: Ptám se vedoucího na svou pracovní dobu.
translations.da: Jeg spørger chefen om mine arbejdstider.
translations.ja: 自分の勤務時間についてマネージャーに聞いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb (present 1st person singular); takes a direct object and a PP complement.
Definite article in accusative masculine singular, marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition selecting genitive; introduces a causal PP.
Possessive determiner in genitive plural agreeing with the head noun.
Plural noun in genitive, object of the preposition ‘wegen’.

sentences.target: Unser Leiter hat die Besprechung verschoben.

translations.de: Unser Leiter hat die Besprechung verschoben.
translations.en: Our manager has postponed the meeting.
translations.es: Nuestro gerente ha aplazado la reunión.
translations.fr: Notre responsable a reporté la réunion.
translations.it: Il nostro responsabile ha rimandato la riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的经理把会议推迟了。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅經理將會議延後咗。
translations.vi: Quản lý của chúng tôi đã hoãn cuộc họp.
translations.nl: Onze manager heeft de vergadering uitgesteld.
translations.hi: हमारे मैनेजर ने बैठक टाल दी है.
translations.el: Ο διευθυντής μας ανέβαλε τη συνάντηση.
translations.sv: Vår chef har skjutit upp mötet.
translations.ja: うちのマネージャーが会議を延期しました。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner in nominative masculine singular, modifying the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP.
Auxiliary forming the present perfect with the past participle.
Definite article in accusative feminine singular, marking the direct object.
Noun, feminine; direct object of the verb phrase.
Main verb in past participle; head of the VP in perfect construction; transitive, taking ‘Besprechung’ as patient.

sentences.target: Die Mitarbeiter mögen den Leiter sehr.

translations.de: Die Mitarbeiter mögen den Leiter sehr.
translations.en: The employees like the manager a lot.
translations.es: A los empleados les gusta mucho el gerente.
translations.fr: Les employés aiment beaucoup leur responsable.
translations.it: I dipendenti apprezzano molto il responsabile.
translations.pt: Os funcionários gostam muito do gerente.
translations.vi: Nhân viên rất thích quản lý.
translations.nl: De medewerkers vinden de manager heel aardig.
translations.hu: Az alkalmazottak nagyon kedvelik a vezetőt.
translations.hi: कर्मचारियों को मैनेजर बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Οι υπάλληλοι συμπαθούν πολύ τον διευθυντή.
translations.nb: De ansatte liker sjefen veldig godt.
translations.sv: Medarbetarna tycker väldigt mycket om chefen.
translations.ro: Angajații îl plac foarte mult pe manager.
translations.da: Medarbejderne kan rigtig godt lide chefen.
translations.ja: 社員はマネージャーのことがとても好きです。
